notes:
Closer to the design, named voices, and light-mode rain.

- Real frosted glass across the app — panels blur the storm behind them like the design
- Voices named by gender & accent (e.g. "Australian Female") with ♀/♂ icons
- Light theme now has visible rain, not a flat grey background
- The Continue/Resume button is a living liquid blob
- Brighter wave ribbon and hero water; deeper, more atmospheric background
